title: eriosyce crispa var. huascensis
intro: Eriosyce crispa var. huascensis, also known as the Huascaran Pitaya, is a species of cactus found in the Andes mountain range of Peru. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Eriosyce crispa var. huascensis include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
